esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-couchbase.bucket-default
// Peak RAM quota utilisation per bucket over the rule time window
| STATS peak_ram_quota_pct = MAX(couchbase.bucket.ram.quota.used.pct)
  BY couchbase.bucket.name
// Align with SRE guide: investigate above ~85–90%
| WHERE peak_ram_quota_pct > 85.0
| SORT peak_ram_quota_pct DESC
| LIMIT 20
